know that countries, peoples etc. are allotted both to the quarters
and to the planets in XIV & XVI supra. Hence the compound
in verse 21 can also be interpreted thus : "When the
several quarters as well as the several planets are attacked by
meteors, it would spell ruin to the countries, peoples, objects etc.
assigned to them severally•"j

If sounds of roaring, clapping hands, instrumental music,
songs and loud cries are heard at the time of falling of a meteor,
there would be danger to the country and its king.

Signs of Meteors XXXIII 313
If a meteor having the form of a rod leaves its trail on the sky
for a long time, it bodes disaster to the king. So does one that
appears to be carried along the sky by a thread, or one that looks
like Indra's banner.
